feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Blood, Sweat and Tears
entry.summary:
Author: itsmepaper

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,615Chapters: 5/15Kudos: 43

Summary: Merlin disappears in the middle of the night, leaving behind nothing but a scream heard by a nearby servant, a smear of blood, and a castle full of unanswered questions. Arthur is convinced it’s just Merlin being Merlin, until the hours stretch on, the clues grow stranger, and the fear in Camelot becomes impossible to ignore. Arthur goes off on a journey to find the missing Merlin, to bring him home, back to Camelot. But that’s harder than Arthur could have ever imagined.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,776Chapters: 56/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,987Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 68

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: tell me all the time not to worry
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Merlin’s journey took nearly a week. An eternity for those who remained in Camelot. Especially Freya. Arthur watched the change settle into her day by day.

entry.title: The Magical Experiment
entry.summary:
Author: twobraincellscombined

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,082Chapters: 17/17Kudos: 299

Summary: Arthur asks Merlin to learn magic to see if it can be trusted in defeating Morgana.   "We want to ask someone to learn magic to see if it can be used without corrupting the soul of the person who uses it. Lancelot suggested you be the person we ask."Merlin's lips parted a fraction, "He did?""Indeed. Something about your heart being pure." Arthur brushed the compliment off with a wave of his hand and straightened in his seat, "I know you're scared of magic so you don’t have to do this if you don’t want to but-""I'll do it." Now complete with added prologue and epilogue!

entry.title: Dark Tower, Golden Sun
entry.summary:
Author: Jellyfax

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,999Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 16

Summary: When a sickness sweeps through Camelot, Prince Arthur is tasked with finding the one person powerful enough to stop its spread: The Warlock of the Tower. However, neither the famed warlock nor the mysterious tower are quite as they seem, and Arthur finds himself trapped, with death behind every door. Can he survive the tower's trials? Will the warlock turn out to be the villain his father warned him of, or the saviour that Gaius had promised? Who is the strange man who keeps appearing whenever Arthur needs sanctuary? Can Arthur save himself and his people, or is Camelot doomed?

entry.title: As beautiful as in our dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Linowish

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,206Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 10

Summary: After season 1, we said "I wish it was like this" and I wanted to try it too.   Merlin was getting really tired and continuing with his life without receiving any thanks; it was very difficult.Arthur was like everyone around him; everyone saw him only as a prince, no one saw him as a friend, except Merlin.

entry.title: A Hidden Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,212Chapters: 54/67Kudos: 222

Summary: Merthur receives a surprise neither of them expected, turning not only their lives upside down, but also those of everyone around them.Will they be able to find their happy ending, while hiding everything from King Uther with the help of their friends?****Stay tuned to find out and keep reading. It's going to be a multi-chapter story. The number of chapters is unknown yet, but more tags will surely be added soon. So stay tuned for updates.

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,900Chapters: 9/20Kudos: 32

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Knock knock. Who's There? Sad Little Richboy. Sad Little Richboy Who?
entry.summary:
Author: Ashyface

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,865Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: Merlin floundered for a minute, mouth opening and closing as he processed that this was indeed Arthur Pendragon at his door. The same Arthur who last he saw Merlin, had told him to call when he was ever sick of being pathetic so he could beg for his job back. And Merlin made a vow that he would never work for him again, no matter how desperate or broke he became. He would never stoop low enough to beg the Pendragons for anything. Merlin felt the same rage he felt back then ignite back into his gut and he straightened, not caring if this prat was bloody dying. He went to close the door, but Arthur stopped it, jaw clenched.    "Hey...!" He cleared his throat, clenching his jaw for a second. "I... need somewhere to stay. And you're... poor right? I can get you your job back." Merlin scoffed, pushing harder on the door, but Arthur was still stronger. Damn him and his ungodly workout regimen.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Stone Cold Lips
entry.summary:
Author: MetalHydrationVessel

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,835Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 81

Summary: In which Merlin is immortal, used all of his free time to do things because he'd go crazy otherwise and got filthy rich like an old vampire without meaning to, hung out with Shakespeare and a bunch of other people because why not, got gifted a pretty Cadillac that he hates by a charity he'd forgotten he'd donated to, and has a too-high alcohol tolerance for his liking. Oh, and he bought Avalon Lake. Because "Shut up, I just like looking at this lake and no, I don't need help, mental or otherwise."

entry.title: Just the Beginning (eng)
entry.summary:
Author: DraculaN666

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,528Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 24

Summary: Merlin has always known he has magic, but he also thought he was the only one. Like a very subtle genetic flaw that no one else was supposed to find out about. Until the Hogwarts letter arrived.

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,045Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?Season 2 of The Bond Series (I have fixed and reposted Season 1- I suggest you read that first, or this season won't make much sense). Note, you'll see each "book" in this season titled as an episode- make's it easier to follow the timeline, I think. For those who wished for less Merlin Whump and more Arthur- I have failed you, deeply :( I did make efforts to respect the "I wish Merlin was conscious more" requests!

entry.title: Three Teardrops
entry.summary:
Author: grlnxtdr29

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,300Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 30

Summary: The Search for the Dragon Eggs continues in this sequel to Of Legends and (Rugby) Kings. Now that Charlie and the Paris Squad are starting to remember their past, it is time to focus on helping the Sorcerer complete his Quest to restore the Dragon Race, and bring Magick back to the world. Along the way, they will encounter old foes, and new ones, while discovering things about themselves they never realized before. There will be memories of Camelot, and perhaps even some surprises along the way!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,549Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 66

Summary: A court Adviser that has been under Uther for decades starts to worry about what will happen when the old king dies and his son, Arthur, takes over. So he plans to win the Young prince’s favor by giving him the thing he wants the most… Merlin.

entry.title: Albion's Greatest Need
entry.summary:
Author: AngelOfAlbion

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,329Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” With closed eyes, Merlin reached upward and imagined Arthur’s warm hand wrapping around his own. There was a sick irony in hearing this now, in these final moments. “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” For Merlin was alone. He died alone. ـــــــــــــــــــﮩ٨ـ After fifteen hundred years, the cessation of Magic forces 'Albion's Greatest Need' to emerge. When both Arthur and Merlin are resurrected, it's Merlin's duty to teach the King of Camelot modern innovation. However, resurrection is not enough, and destiny forces redemption. Or Merlin and Arthur get thrown back in time to their convention with The Disir, only this time, they have no choice but to accept magic.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
